hostname R10
!
interface Loopback0
 ip address 10.10.10.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
!
interface Ethernet1/0
 ip address 172.168.45.2 255.255.255.252
 no shutdown
!
interface Ethernet0/0
 ip address 192.168.10.1 255.255.255.252
 
 no shutdown
!
ip route 10.6.6.0 255.255.255.0 172.168.45.1
ip route 10.1.1.0 255.255.255.0 172.168.45.1
ip route 10.2.2.0 255.255.255.0 172.168.45.1
ip route 10.3.3.0 255.255.255.0 172.168.45.1
ip route 10.4.4.0 255.255.255.0 172.168.45.1
ip route 10.5.5.0 255.255.255.0 172.168.45.1
ip route 10.7.7.0 255.255.255.0 172.168.45.1
ip route 10.8.8.0 255.255.255.0 172.168.45.1
ip route 10.9.9.0 255.255.255.0 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.2.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.10.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.12.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.16.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.19.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.20.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.22.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.23.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.25.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.29.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 172.168.30.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
ip route 192.168.20.0 255.255.255.252 172.168.45.1
!
end
